summary: Exhaustive triage of ALL lumen SF brainstorm seeds (~180, flux-wall + resist-laser) vs the frozen EUV meta-laws; surface genuinely-new in-silico escapes never carded

all_classifications.seed_title: Plasma-cascade staging — refill wake for many bunches/shot, >=10 bunches/pulse
all_classifications.rationale: Multi-bunch charge/rep-rate multiplication = the Q and f flux-face reopen already carded; staging is meta-law escape E3, charge bounded by space-charge not conservation (flux verdict).

all_classifications.seed_title: Cryo-undulator linewidth squeeze — N>=100 cold periods, Dl/l < 1%
all_classifications.rationale: Many-period cold undulator narrowing the line is exactly the cryo-many-period-undulator half of abstract H_A3 (recirc + cryo undulator).

all_classifications.seed_title: Energy-chirp linewidth compensation — chirp matched to tapered undulator
all_classifications.rationale: Chirp+dechirp compression of energy spread is the named E4 quality-wall lever verified as the cooling card H_013 (and bounded by slice-spread in H_031/H_023).

all_classifications.seed_title: Inverse-Compton recirculated photon cavity — enhancement >=1e4
all_classifications.rationale: Cavity-enhanced inverse-Compton is H_A1, verified-deepened in H_033/H_034/H_035 (IR-cavity finesse 1e4 reopens the ICS flux wall).

all_classifications.seed_title: Harmonic-undulator wavelength shortcut — 3rd/5th harmonic 6.5 nm at lower energy
all_classifications.rationale: Reaching shorter lambda from lower energy is a wavelength-dial play; M5 says wavelength has no floor and is never the wall — the cost just migrates to flux/quality. Confirmed by H_007/H_015.

all_classifications.seed_title: Two-laser wake refresh — interleave two drive lasers, >=1.8x thermal limit
all_classifications.rationale: Pure rep-rate-vs-thermal-limit engineering; the f-face is declared reopenable-but-economic, bounded by removable heat-flux (M8) which is ~0.5% of cost = negligible, not a new wall.

all_classifications.seed_title: Self-modulated proton-driver hybrid (AWAKE) — sustained current >=10x single-shot
all_classifications.rationale: Sustained-current/charge multiplication to lift average power = the f/Q flux-face reopen already carded (ERL/flux-reopen family); current is the reopenable f-face, not a conservation law.

all_classifications.seed_title: Bunch-train undulator pulse stacking — micro-bunch train matched to scan dwell
all_classifications.rationale: Throughput packaging of bunches under a peak-damage cap is reopenable-f engineering bounded only by removable heat (M8-negligible); no new assumption broken.

all_classifications.seed_title: Dielectric-laser-accelerator afterburner — chip-scale DLA booster, +100 MeV
all_classifications.rationale: Higher-gradient compact booster is the footprint-x-gradient compact-accelerator lever (E3/M3) carded as H_004; gradient trades against footprint, not a new face.

all_classifications.seed_title: SF: standing-wave gamma-ray (optical) undulator — EUV at <=50 MeV
all_classifications.rationale: An optical/laser undulator (counter-laser as sub-micron period) is inverse-Compton scattering by another name — the IC photon-generation mechanism already carded in H_006/H_033, not SF.

all_classifications.seed_title: Energy-recovery LPA loop — decelerate spent bunches, recovery >=80%
all_classifications.rationale: Energy-recovery linac is verbatim H_016 (ERL lifts rep-rate by 1/(1-eta), cuts wall-plug/W).

all_classifications.seed_title: Photon-recycling cavity around wafer — resonant ring reuses un-absorbed EUV
all_classifications.rationale: Demand-side recovery of otherwise-lost EUV photons = the gating/grazing in-band recovery family (H_012, recovery not generation); flux H_008 untouched.

all_classifications.seed_title: Many-source beam combining — sum K=20 small modules incoherently
all_classifications.rationale: Module-array summation to reach the flux floor is the mass-produced module-array lever in H_022/H_021/H_029 (also rides the M7 learning curve).

all_classifications.seed_title: Wafer-swarm parallel exposure — expose M=10 wafers at once via fan-out
all_classifications.rationale: One source fanned out to many exposure stations is the single-source amortization/utilization law M9 (per-wafer cost via served throughput); carded econ-side H_019/H_009-N>=2 fan-out.

all_classifications.seed_title: Recirculating-ring micro-storage — ~m loop, >=20 turns, avg power x20
all_classifications.rationale: Multi-turn recirculating micro-storage for x-N average power is the recirculating-micro-storage half of H_A3; the steady reused-ring-beam version is verified as SSMB H_043/H_044.

all_classifications.seed_title: Round-robin plasma cells — carousel of N cells, each cools while others fire
all_classifications.rationale: Thermal-duty-cycling cells to beat the per-cell heat limit is pure waste-heat/rep-rate engineering bounded by M8 (heat removal), declared real but ~0.5%-of-cost negligible; no new face.

all_classifications.seed_title: Spent-beam second-color harvest — second undulator for soft-X-ray metrology
all_classifications.rationale: Extracting extra value (a second output) from one machine is the single-source amortization/utilization law M9; it spreads CAPEX, does not break a flux/physics assumption.

all_classifications.seed_title: Drive-laser coherent combining — combine many fiber lasers, >=10 kW at >=10 kHz
all_classifications.rationale: Fiber-laser coherent combining for high-average-power drive is the named replicability/drive-combining lever in H_029 (and the drive side of the f-face reopen).

all_classifications.seed_title: Bunch-on-demand two-fab interleave — time-multiplex bunch train across two illuminators
all_classifications.rationale: Time-multiplexing one source across two illuminators/fabs is utilization-amortization (M9), the carded CAPEX-per-wafer lever (H_019/H_021), not a new flux escape.

all_classifications.seed_title: SF: SRF recirculating + LPA injection — compact injection + storage-ring avg power
all_classifications.rationale: SRF energy-recovery/storage with compact injection is the ERL/recirculation flux-reopen (H_016) combined with the compact injector (H_004) — already carded, not SF.

all_classifications.seed_title: Higher-R 6.5 nm multilayer (La/B) — R>=0.65 -> column throughput x2
all_classifications.rationale: La/B 6.5nm reflectance is exactly the H_002 mirror-throughput wall input; H_026 already sourced La/B R=0.58 (not 0.65), making the wall ~8x — this seed is the optimistic side of the same carded number.

all_classifications.seed_title: Fewer-mirror illuminator — N=7 not 11 via aspheres -> x3
all_classifications.rationale: H_002 verdict explicitly computes the N=7 case (T x5.41 from dropping mirrors); reducing bounce count to beat R^N is the M1/E1 lever already carded as part of H_002/H_012.

all_classifications.seed_title: Grazing-incidence / Wolter optics — R->0.9 -> net throughput x5
all_classifications.rationale: Grazing-incidence column at R=0.9 is the verified core of H_012 (promoted H_A4); the x5 bar is literally the H_012 falsifier (achieved 8.03x).

all_classifications.seed_title: Diffractive/zone-plate transmission optics cut bounce count, efficiency >=40%
all_classifications.rationale: Transmission/diffractive EUV optics efficiency is set by real fabricated zone-plate/grating diffraction efficiency and absorption in actual materials at 6.5/13.5nm — settleable only by fab+measurement, not a closed-form sweep; same demand-side optics-loss family as M1/H_002 but no new assumption broken.

all_classifications.seed_title: Photon-efficient resist (MOR) — dose-to-size <=10 mJ/cm2 -> power /3
all_classifications.rationale: Lower dose-to-size via metal-oxide resist is the demand-side absorption lever carded as H_B2 (high-cross-section ultrathin resist); the RLS trade is the noted risk.

all_classifications.seed_title: Quantum-yield sensitizer resist — embed Sn/Sb absorbers, absorption >=2x CAR
all_classifications.rationale: Embedding high-Z absorbers (Sn/Sb) to raise effective EUV absorption >=2x at equal LWR is precisely H_B2's mechanism and >=2x-effective-dose prediction.

all_classifications.seed_title: Adaptive graded multilayer — graded period catches a broad/chirped 2.2% line
all_classifications.rationale: Capturing a broad 2.2% line is the in-band/linewidth budget of H_009 (and the cooling split H_013); a graded mirror that passes a wide line is a demand-side restatement of the same 2% capture wall, not a new escape.

all_classifications.seed_title: Membrane/pellicle-free path — delete transmissive elements -> +1.4x flux
all_classifications.rationale: Removing the pellicle/membrane is physically plausible flux recovery but its viability is a defectivity/contamination question settled only by real fab and tool operation, not computation; same recovery (not generation) family as H_012/H_014, flux wall H_008 untouched.

all_classifications.seed_title: Cooled high-power mirrors — survive >=500 W incident, wavefront drift <=lambda/50
all_classifications.rationale: Surviving incident heat-flux on optics is a waste-heat cooling play; M8 (Landauer/2nd-law waste-heat) is frozen as real but ~0.5% of cost (H_020) — economically negligible, not the decision wall.

all_classifications.seed_title: SF: phase-conjugate / metamaterial flat optic replaces a multi-mirror relay
all_classifications.rationale: An EUV metasurface/flat optic is in principle in-silico designable but its real efficiency at 13.5/6.5nm is a fabrication/absorption question; same demand-side optics-loss target as M1/H_002/H_012 with no broken meta-law — not a live in-silico escape.

all_classifications.seed_title: Shot-by-shot spectral gating — veto out-of-band shots, in-band >=98%
all_classifications.rationale: Shot-by-shot spectral gating is the named first half of H_A4, verified inside H_012 (gating+grazing recovery); pure in-band recovery, flux H_008 untouched.

all_classifications.seed_title: ML wake-phase stabilizer — RMS energy jitter <=0.3% at >=1 kHz
all_classifications.rationale: Real-time density/timing feedback to suppress shot-to-shot LPA energy jitter is a control-loop performance claim settleable only on a real plasma accelerator with real latency/sensor noise; reduces energy spread (H_009 territory) but is not itself a new physical escape.

all_classifications.seed_title: Dose-feedback adaptive scan — stage speed tracks live flux, recover >=90% ideal WPH
all_classifications.rationale: Adaptive stage-speed dose control recovers usable throughput against flux swings; a scanner-control engineering claim verifiable only on a real tool, not a meta-law escape (throughput floor H_005 / flux H_008 unchanged).

all_classifications.seed_title: Digital-twin source autotune — simulator re-optimizes setpoints, >=20% more in-band W
all_classifications.rationale: A digital-twin autotuner squeezing 20% more in-band power from an existing source is an operations/uptime gain measurable only against a real machine; it recovers, not generates, and breaks no M1-M10 assumption.

all_classifications.seed_title: Predictive thermal throttling — ML maxes rep-rate just under damage, >=1.3x static cap
all_classifications.rationale: Pushing rep-rate to the heat/damage limit is a waste-heat-managed rep-rate play; the f-ceiling is engineering/heat-bounded (flux-face verdict, M8), and M8 is frozen as economically negligible (~0.5%, H_020).

all_classifications.seed_title: Phase-space tagging + post-selection — route only in-spec bunches, <=0.5% effective spread
all_classifications.rationale: Post-selecting low-spread bunches to reach <=0.5% effective spread targets the same M4 quality sub-wall H_013 beats by cooling; it throws away charge (a flux cost) rather than cooling, so it is the carded quality-wall, not a new lever.

all_classifications.seed_title: In-situ multilayer drift correction — track reflectivity decay, re-phase
all_classifications.rationale: Holding multilayer reflectivity over a maintenance interval is an uptime/lifetime claim on real coated optics; measurable only by real fab/operation, no meta-law broken.

all_classifications.seed_title: Coherence-based virtual dose — partial-coherence control raises contrast, dose-to-size /1.5
all_classifications.rationale: Cutting effective dose-to-size by tuning partial coherence is a demand-side dose reduction in the H_B2/throughput family, but the contrast-vs-CD payoff is settleable only by real imaging/resist measurement, not closed form.

all_classifications.seed_title: Federated multi-tool learning — share tuning models across fleet, ramp-to-spec /2
all_classifications.rationale: Fleet-wide federated tuning to halve ramp time is a pure fab-operations/uptime gain measurable only across a real installed base; touches no source physics or meta-law.

all_classifications.seed_title: SF: attosecond feed-forward timing lock — fs cross-correlation locks bunch to IC laser, jitter <=1 fs
all_classifications.rationale: Attosecond/fs timing lock between bunch and inverse-Compton laser is exactly the timing-lock half of H_A1 (cavity-enhanced ICS + <=1fs jitter -> in-band/linewidth), with the same <=1fs prediction.

all_classifications.seed_title: Central synchrotron-to-fab fan-out (one ring feeds >=10 scanners)
all_classifications.rationale: Shared central source amortized across N scanners = the xLight-shaped M9 amortization route already carded in H_030 (and H_010/H_019).

all_classifications.seed_title: Source-at-reticle co-location (delete relay mirrors, <=5 surfaces)
all_classifications.rationale: Cutting reflective surfaces to recover in-band flux is the M1/E1 optics-loss recovery lever already verified in H_012 (grazing/fewer-mirror column, ~8x).

all_classifications.seed_title: Maskless direct-write EUV (steer a spot, no illuminator column)
all_classifications.rationale: Litho-architecture/throughput reframing of the demand side; dwell x pixels vs scan budget is settleable only by real scanner engineering, not the in-silico source physics.

all_classifications.seed_title: Electron-beam-to-wafer (photon-free projection e-beam)
all_classifications.rationale: Abandons the EUV photon entirely (not a light source at all); e-beam projection WPH is a fab/throughput measurement, outside the source-problem scope this campaign tests in-silico.

all_classifications.seed_title: Vacuum-integrated source-scanner (windowless plasma->wafer, +1.3x)
all_classifications.rationale: A modest optics-loss recovery (~H_012 family) whose +1.3x payoff is a window/debris-mitigation engineering question only real integration can settle.

all_classifications.seed_title: Stepperless full-field flash (expose whole field in one pulse)
all_classifications.rationale: Requires field-dose x area per pulse = enormous peak/average power from one emitter; rests on the power-rep-rate product floor M2 (and the H_008 flux face), no new escape.

all_classifications.seed_title: Source-on-stage co-scan (compact source rides the stage, flux x1.5)
all_classifications.rationale: A path-length/geometry engineering tweak (x1.5) only a real compact-source+stage build can validate; no meta-law assumption broken.

all_classifications.seed_title: Cluster-tool photon pooling (utilization >=90% -> WPH x1.4)
all_classifications.rationale: Raising source utilization across overlapping steps is exactly the M9 single-source amortization/utilization law (carded H_019); cheap-per-wafer-only-at-high-utilization is pre-satisfied.

all_classifications.seed_title: Hybrid lithography (EUV only for <=5 critical layers)
all_classifications.rationale: Reducing EUV photon demand by using EUV only on critical layers is the demand-side multiplier already carded as H_B3 (two-color/arm) / H_005 demand reduction.

all_classifications.seed_title: SF: remote mega-source beamed down via waveguide
all_classifications.rationale: Viability hinges on EUV waveguide loss vs column loss; no known low-loss EUV waveguide exists, so it is a real-material/measurement question, not an in-silico meta-law escape.

all_classifications.seed_title: High-harmonic-generation (HHG) IR->EUV upconversion, tabletop
all_classifications.rationale: HHG is in the non-accelerator landscape census H_042 (0.30x, far below HVM) and the all-optical card H_A5; exotic-family variant per H_025.

all_classifications.seed_title: Relativistic plasma-mirror harmonics (Doppler upshift off overdense plasma)
all_classifications.rationale: Plasma-mirror harmonics are the all-optical/exotic family carded in H_A5 and classified redundant in the at-frontier census (H_025/H_042).

all_classifications.seed_title: Recombination / inner-shell plasma EUV laser (gL>=5, repetitive)
all_classifications.rationale: Population-inverted recombination/inner-shell EUV laser is exactly H_B4 / H_017 (gL>=14 geometry verified; 13.5nm gain the open frontier).

all_classifications.seed_title: Cluster-nanoplasma resonant emission (engineered Sn/Xe clusters, 2x flat LPP)
all_classifications.rationale: A plasma/discharge thermal-emitter variant (DPP-like, H_042); its average in-band power rests on the M2 power-rep-rate plasma floor, no decoupling escape.

all_classifications.seed_title: Parametric EUV up/down-conversion (nonlinear mixing)
all_classifications.rationale: There is no known phase-matchable EUV-transparent nonlinear medium (all matter absorbs EUV); the 10^-6 proof bar is a real material/measurement question, not a clean in-silico break of M1-M10.

all_classifications.seed_title: Bragg-coherent betatron radiation (LPA betatron as built-in undulator)
all_classifications.rationale: Betatron radiation rides the same LPA and is the exotic family explicitly classified as a CAPEX-inheriting variant in the at-frontier census (H_025); broad incoherent spectrum re-binds to H_009/H_008.

all_classifications.seed_title: Channeling radiation in a crystal (atomic-scale undulator, TV/m)
all_classifications.rationale: Channeling radiation is the exotic-family variant named and dismissed in the at-frontier census (H_025) as riding the same accelerator (inherits CAPEX) / source-coherent restated.

all_classifications.seed_title: Superradiant atomic EUV burst (Dicke, intensity ~N^1.5)
all_classifications.rationale: A source-coherent inverted-ensemble EUV emitter; same open frontier as the recombination laser (H_017/H_B4) -- the gating unknown is a 13.5nm inversion/gain medium, already carded, no new in-silico falsifier.

all_classifications.seed_title: Nuclear-isomer (8 eV-class) emitter
all_classifications.rationale: The 8 eV-class isomer transition (Th-229) is a ~150 nm VUV line, not 13.5/6.5 nm EUV; belongs to a different rung of the M10 band axis (metrology-first), not the EUV node.

all_classifications.seed_title: Free-electron-laser micro-SASE (LPA beam into short FEL)
all_classifications.rationale: Compact LPA-driven micro-SASE FEL is carded as H_A2 (and the slice-spread analysis H_031/H_033); exponential gain at the flux root, threatened by H_009 spread.

all_classifications.seed_title: SF: dynamical-Casimir / structured-vacuum emission
all_classifications.rationale: No physical host / not in-silico-testable as an EUV light source -- explicitly the dynamical-Casimir SF case named in the triage rubric.

all_classifications.seed_title: SF: positronium annihilation line
all_classifications.rationale: Engineered annihilation cascades have no physical host and the line is 511 keV gamma, not EUV -- the positronium SF case named in the rubric.

all_classifications.seed_title: LPA-driven micro-SASE FEL (R6-10×R1)
all_classifications.rationale: Exactly the H_A2 compact LPA-driven micro-SASE FEL card (R7-1/R6-10 is its named source).

all_classifications.seed_title: Recirculating ring + cryo narrow undulator
all_classifications.rationale: Verbatim source of the H_A3 recirc micro-storage + cryo many-period undulator card.

all_classifications.seed_title: IC optical cavity + attosecond timing lock
all_classifications.rationale: Verbatim source of the H_A1 cavity-enhanced inverse-Compton + timing-lock card; also subsumed by ICS chain H_033-H_036.

all_classifications.seed_title: Spectral-gating + grazing column
all_classifications.rationale: H_A4 promoted to verified H_012 (8.03x in-band recovery); identical seed.

all_classifications.seed_title: Photon-efficient resist + hybrid layers
all_classifications.rationale: Demand-side combo of high-cross-section resist (H_B2) + hybrid/two-color critical-layer reduction (H_B3); both carded.

all_classifications.seed_title: Fiber-combined drive + round-robin cells
all_classifications.rationale: Fiber drive-laser combining + thermal round-robin = the rep-rate/replicable-module engineering already carded (H_029 fiber-combining; M2 non-thermal route).

all_classifications.seed_title: Betatron + graded adaptive multilayer
all_classifications.rationale: Betatron is intrinsic LPA wiggle radiation bound by the same flux/beam-quality wall (M4/H_008); graded-multilayer broad-line capture is the H_A3/H_012 optics lever. No new assumption broken.

all_classifications.seed_title: ERL + multi-source combining
all_classifications.rationale: ERL flux reopen (H_016) + module-array amortization/replication (H_021/H_029); the capstone H_022 already stacks both.

all_classifications.seed_title: Plasma-mirror harmonics + photon-recycling illuminator
all_classifications.rationale: Plasma-mirror/relativistic-harmonic non-accelerator source is in the H_042 landscape (none reach HVM floor); photon-recycling is the H_012-family optics recovery.

all_classifications.seed_title: Extreme all-optical EUV (HHG->plasma-mirror->metasurface)
all_classifications.rationale: Verbatim source of the H_A5 all-optical-EUV moonshot card; also bounded by H_042 (HHG 0.30x floor).

all_classifications.seed_title: Chirp-compensation + SASE
all_classifications.rationale: Chirp/dechirp is the E4/P4 quality lever verified as H_013 (energy-spread cooling); SASE leg is H_A2. No orthogonal escape.

all_classifications.seed_title: Direct e-beam litho fallback + LPA
all_classifications.rationale: Abandons the EUV-photon source problem (projection e-beam, photon-free); throughput/node viability is a fab-measurable question, not an in-silico light-source escape; akin to demand reframe H_B3 but settled by real tool measurement.

all_classifications.seed_title: Stochastic-resonance dosing
all_classifications.rationale: Resist-nonlinearity demand lever (sub-threshold noise prints) in the H_B2/H_B5 family; the 0.8x-dose claim rests on real resist chemistry/blur, settleable only by measurement.

all_classifications.seed_title: Spectral-purity-by-target-chemistry
all_classifications.rationale: Engineer a single dominant ion transition = intrinsically-narrow line dropping the SPF; verified as H_014/H_B1 in-band recovery (narrow-line).

all_classifications.seed_title: Cooperative self-seeded FEL
all_classifications.rationale: Self-seeding to collapse SASE bandwidth is the FEL coherence/linewidth lever feeding the conventional-ERL-FEL answer (H_023/H_038); FEL family already mapped.

all_classifications.seed_title: Cascaded HGHG harmonic stages
all_classifications.rationale: Seeded-FEL harmonic cascade is bound by the same FEL slice-spread wall (H_031/H_032) and routes to the conventional-ERL-FEL; wavelength dial is M5 (not the wall).

all_classifications.seed_title: Wafer-side wavelength conversion (resist downconverter)
all_classifications.rationale: A longer-wavelength source photon carries far less than an EUV quantum; single-photon up-conversion to EUV-class bond chemistry violates per-photon energy, and multiphoton needs EUV-class intensity. No physical host.

all_classifications.seed_title: chemically-amplified gain runaway (turnover >=10^3 -> dose <5 mJ/cm2)
all_classifications.rationale: Catalytic chemical-amplification turnover in a resist film is wet-chemistry/formulation; settled only by real resist synthesis + LER measurement, not closed-form sim.

all_classifications.seed_title: high-Z sensitizer two-step (Sn/Sb, >=3x fewer photons)
all_classifications.rationale: High-Z (Sn/Sb) sensitizer absorption gain is a material-formulation claim verifiable only by fabricating the resist and measuring dose-to-clear; RLS trade is the risk (cf H_B2).

all_classifications.seed_title: metal-oxide cluster resists (4-6x absorption -> <=15 mJ/cm2)
all_classifications.rationale: Exactly H_B2 high-cross-section ultrathin resist (4-6x EUV absorption MOx); MOx named as the 'real' case in the H_B2 card.

all_classifications.seed_title: dry/ALD ultrathin resist (<=40% photon budget)
all_classifications.rationale: ALD/dry ultrathin film is a deposition+absorption variant of the high-absorption-resist family (H_B2); plausible but settleable only by fab + dose measurement.

all_classifications.seed_title: resonant-cavity resist stack (absorption 30%->70%)
all_classifications.rationale: A thin-film interference stack to boost in-film absorption is optically computable but its litho payoff (LER, dose-to-clear) is a real-resist measurement; demand-side resist family.

all_classifications.seed_title: sparse-EUV (cuts only) + DSA/DUV bulk (<=10% full-field dose)
all_classifications.rationale: Sparse-EUV + cheap-bulk patterning dropping full-field EUV dose to <=10-20% is the two-color narrow-arm / EUV-only-arms idea carded as H_B3.

all_classifications.seed_title: single-photon-counting (Geiger-mode) resist (<5 photons/pixel>)
all_classifications.rationale: Geiger-mode / photon-counting resist printing at ~5 photons/pixel is verbatim H_B5 digital photon-counting litho (per-photon gain >10^3 crux).

all_classifications.seed_title: two-color resist (EUV arms, cheap visible fires, <=30% EUV dose)
all_classifications.rationale: EUV defines the latent pattern (arms) and a cheap visible flood develops it, cutting EUV dose -- this is H_B3 two-color narrow-arm litho.

all_classifications.seed_title: thermal-latent phase-change resist
all_classifications.rationale: A phase-change / thermal-latent imaging mechanism is novel resist-material chemistry; only fab + exposure can settle whether it lowers photon demand at acceptable LER. Demand-side.

all_classifications.seed_title: multi-pass dose averaging (EPE ~ 1/sqrt(K))
all_classifications.rationale: Multi-pass exposure to average stochastic edge-placement error is a scanner/process-recipe stochastics claim; 1/sqrt(K) is trivially true but CD/throughput payoff is a real-tool measurement (cluster C4).

all_classifications.seed_title: standing-wave dose concentration (>=80% dose into <20% area)
all_classifications.rationale: Concentrating absorbed dose into the feature via standing-wave/interference is optically computable but its litho benefit is a resist+stack fab measurement; same demand-side family.

all_classifications.seed_title: source-resist co-design (>=20% effective in-band recovered)
all_classifications.rationale: Co-designing a narrow source so the resist sees more usable in-band power is the no-SPF / in-band-recovery lever carded as H_B1 -> verified H_014 (1.43x recovery).

all_classifications.seed_title: Ni-like/Ne-like collisional XRL at 13.5 nm (gL>=14)
all_classifications.rationale: Collisional XRL reaching saturation gL>=14 at 13.5 nm is the recombination/collisional EUV-laser geometry carded as H_B4 and verified for the saturation requirement as H_017 (13.5nm gain the open frontier).

all_classifications.seed_title: inner-shell photo-pumped (pump < Auger lifetime)
all_classifications.rationale: Inner-shell photo-pumped X-ray lasing (pump faster than Auger lifetime) is a real plasma-pump scheme; whether 13.5nm inversion is reachable is the open gain frontier of H_B4/H_017, an experiment.

all_classifications.seed_title: 3-body recombination in rapidly-cooled plasma (gain >5 cm^-1)
all_classifications.rationale: 3-body recombination lasing in a fast-cooled plasma IS the recombination-laser mechanism behind H_B4; H_017 already shows ~1 cm^-1 over a waveguide reaches gL>=14.

all_classifications.seed_title: capillary-discharge Z-pinch pushed to higher Z (gL>=5)
all_classifications.rationale: Pushing the demonstrated 46.9nm Ar capillary-discharge laser to higher-Z/shorter-lambda is a real discharge-plasma experiment; the experimental path to the H_017 13.5nm-gain frontier (reference-matched to that Ar device).

all_classifications.seed_title: OFI all-optical recombination laser (<1 J/pulse)
all_classifications.rationale: Optical-field-ionization all-optical recombination laser is a member of the recombination/collisional EUV-laser family carded as H_B4; overlaps the all-optical EUV moonshot H_A5.

all_classifications.seed_title: dielectronic-recombination selective feed (FWHM <0.5%)
all_classifications.rationale: Dielectronic-recombination selective level feeding for an intrinsically narrow line is a narrowing mechanism inside the recombination-laser family (H_B4); brainstorm R8 flags autoionizing/DR as a dup.

all_classifications.seed_title: HHG-seeded plasma amplifier (>100x single-pass, seed-locked line)
all_classifications.rationale: Seeding a plasma EUV amplifier with HHG for a locked single-pass-gain line is the HHG->plasma-mirror-amplify moonshot carded as H_A5 (all-optical EUV).

all_classifications.seed_title: quasi-CW high-rep Ni-like (>=10 kHz, >=1 uJ)
all_classifications.rationale: High-rep (>=10 kHz) quasi-CW collisional laser delivering avg power is precisely the 're-invertible high-rep recombination laser' framing of H_B4 (gL>=14 at >=10 kHz).

all_classifications.seed_title: 6.5 nm Gd/Tb lanthanide lasing line (leapfrog)
all_classifications.rationale: A 6.5 nm Gd/Tb line is the BEUV (6.5nm) rung, a different node on the M10 wavelength axis than the 13.5nm EUV target; explicitly the 6.5nm leapfrog band.

all_classifications.seed_title: plasma-waveguide gain extension (saturation in <1 cm)
all_classifications.rationale: Plasma-waveguide extension of gain length to reach saturation in a short device is the EXACT mechanism verified in H_017 (waveguide 140x length, gL>=14 at modest gain).

all_classifications.seed_title: transfer pumping (donor->acceptor plasma)
all_classifications.rationale: Resonant energy transfer from a donor to an acceptor ion to feed a selective upper level is a real two-species plasma-pump scheme; whether it yields 13.5nm inversion is an experimental gain question inside H_B4/H_017.

all_classifications.seed_title: waste-energy harvest from spent LPP tin plasma (>=1% recovered coherent)
all_classifications.rationale: Recovering energy from the spent tin plasma is a waste-heat/efficiency play; per M8 the waste-heat term is real but ~0.5% of LPP cost-of-ownership (H_020), economically negligible -- not the decision wall.

all_classifications.seed_title: magnetic confinement re-invertible column
all_classifications.rationale: Magnetically confining the lasing plasma column for high-rep re-inversion is a plasma-engineering variant of the re-invertible high-rep laser (H_B4); settleable by plasma experiment, not the optics harness.

all_classifications.seed_title: DFB plasma density grating (single-mode, dlambda/lambda<10^-3)
all_classifications.rationale: A distributed-feedback density grating in the plasma to enforce single-mode narrow output is a real plasma-optics scheme; a narrowing/feedback mechanism inside the recombination-laser family (H_B4), settled by experiment.

all_classifications.seed_title: EBIT-pumped HCI trap laser
all_classifications.rationale: An electron-beam-ion-trap highly-charged-ion lasing scheme is a real (very-low-flux) trap-source experiment; another member of the source-side narrow-line laser family (H_B4), viability an experimental ion-density/gain question.

all_classifications.seed_title: narrow line + resonant ultrathin resist (≥90% absorption ≤10 nm)
all_classifications.rationale: Resonant-cavity ultrathin high-absorption resist is exactly the high-cross-section ultrathin resist card; narrow-line pairing adds nothing new.

all_classifications.seed_title: coherent source + ptychography/holographic exposure (≥3× fewer photons)
all_classifications.rationale: Coherent lensless/ptychographic exposure photon-economy claim is plausible but settleable only by real exposure/metrology, not a closed-form source-wall calc; not an escape from M1-M10.

all_classifications.seed_title: inverse-litho stochastic budget transfer (≥25% dose cut)
all_classifications.rationale: Computational-lithography dose savings is a software/process lever validated only by stochastic resist measurement; does not break any source meta-law.

all_classifications.seed_title: source-flicker-aware dosing (CD σ<0.5 nm at ±20% jitter)
all_classifications.rationale: Dose-control/feedback against source jitter is a scanner-control measurement question, not an in-silico source-wall falsifier.

all_classifications.seed_title: no-SPF narrow-line recovery (drop spectral-purity filters → +25% in-band)
all_classifications.rationale: This is exactly H_B1 promoted to H_014 (no-SPF in-band recovery, 1.43×).

all_classifications.seed_title: interference/Talbot litho from coherent XRL (≥80% photon utilization)
all_classifications.rationale: Talbot/interference lithography photon-utilization is a real exposure-scheme question settled by fab/metrology; no source meta-law broken.

all_classifications.seed_title: XRL doubles as actinic inspection source
all_classifications.rationale: The dual-use actinic-inspection benefit is explicitly part of the H_B1/H_014 no-SPF narrow-line card.

all_classifications.seed_title: counted-dose feedback (10× fewer defects)
all_classifications.rationale: Counting-based dose feedback is the digital photon-counting litho card (H_B5).

all_classifications.seed_title: coherent recirculation cavity (≥3× fluence)
all_classifications.rationale: Optical recirculation cavity for fluence gain is the ICS recirculation lever already carded (H_034/H_035, cavity at drive wavelength).

all_classifications.seed_title: ML latent-image denoise (60% photon count)
all_classifications.rationale: ML denoise of the latent image is a post-processing/metrology trade, settleable only by real resist data; not a physics source-wall lever.

all_classifications.seed_title: biological photoprotein resist (QY>0.9)
all_classifications.rationale: Biological photoprotein at 13.5 nm has no physical host (proteins photodestruct under EUV) and is not in-silico testable; explicitly flagged SF.

all_classifications.seed_title: metamaterial perfect-absorber resist (≥95% in <15 nm)
all_classifications.rationale: Metamaterial perfect-absorber ultrathin resist is the stretch variant explicitly named inside H_B2.

all_classifications.seed_title: Purcell-enhanced lasing transition (≥5×)
all_classifications.rationale: Purcell enhancement of an EUV lasing transition is a plausible but real-cavity/QED-measurement question; no meta-law it breaks that the recombination-laser card (H_017) does not already cover for gain.

all_classifications.seed_title: squeezed/sub-shot-noise EUV dosing (≥3 dB)
all_classifications.rationale: No physical squeezed-light EUV source exists; sub-shot-noise dosing has no in-silico host and R8 itself notes entanglement-dosing is the same theme.

all_classifications.seed_title: reaction-diffusion self-organizing litho (<10% photon budget)
all_classifications.rationale: Self-organizing/sparse pattern formation needing <10% full-field dose is the same dose-economy play as two-color narrow-arm / sparse-EUV (H_B3).

all_classifications.seed_title: wafer-integrated EUV nanolaser array (≥167 W aggregate, distributed)
all_classifications.rationale: A wafer-integrated distributed EUV nanolaser array has no physical inversion host at 13.5 nm and no in-silico testable mechanism; pure moonshot.

all_classifications.seed_title: Floquet/time-crystal steady inversion
all_classifications.rationale: Time-crystal/Floquet steady population inversion is explicitly listed in the triage as pure-SF with no physical host.

all_classifications.seed_title: DNA-origami single-molecule resist (<2 photons/feature)
all_classifications.rationale: DNA-origami single-molecule resist is named in the triage prompt as a canonical pure-SF seed.

all_classifications.seed_title: starved-source HVM stack (seeded XRL + no-SPF + MOx resist + recycle cavity → 167 W-equiv from <40 W raw)
all_classifications.rationale: A multi-lever combination clearing the 167 W floor is the combination-breakthrough capstone (H_022), components mapping to H_014/H_B2/H_034/H_017; the @-family is depleted (H_025).

all_classifications.seed_title: two-color narrow-arm (OFI laser arms + visible develops, ≤15% EUV dose)
all_classifications.rationale: Verbatim the two-color narrow-arm litho card (H_B3).

all_classifications.seed_title: coherent ptycho-litho (≥4× photon cut)
all_classifications.rationale: Coherent ptychographic lithography photon cut is a real-exposure/metrology question (same as the R5 ptychography seed); not an in-silico source-wall escape.

all_classifications.seed_title: digital photon-counting litho (<1 ppm defect at ⟨5/pixel⟩)
all_classifications.rationale: Verbatim the digital photon-counting litho card (H_B5).

all_classifications.seed_title: sparse-EUV hybrid node (≤10% full-field dose)
all_classifications.rationale: Sparse-EUV cuts + bulk DUV/DSA is the dose-economy play captured by the two-color/sparse card (H_B3).

all_classifications.seed_title: re-invertible high-rep XRL engine (mag-confine + kHz + waste-harvest)
all_classifications.rationale: Re-invertible high-rep recombination laser is exactly H_B4 (partially promoted to H_017); magnetic confinement + kHz + waste-harvest are the same source-side escape.

all_classifications.seed_title: all-optical compact line source (OFI + DFB + waveguide → single-mode saturated, no accelerator)
all_classifications.rationale: All-optical OFI recombination/inner-shell laser with waveguide gain extension is the recombination-laser saturation card (H_017, promotes H_B4); accelerator-free source side.

all_classifications.seed_title: entanglement dosing
all_classifications.rationale: R8 declares it a dup of squeezed-light dosing; same no-physical-EUV-host SF status.

all_classifications.seed_title: CTTS (charge-transfer-to-solvent) sensitizer
all_classifications.rationale: R8 declares CTTS a dup of the high-Z sensitizer / high-cross-section resist family (H_B2).

all_classifications.seed_title: autoionizing / dielectronic-recombination resonance feed
all_classifications.rationale: R8 declares autoionizing ~ DR resonance, a narrow-line feed for the recombination laser already carded as H_017/H_B4.
